title: Bio-Regeneration heals on equip

card.rawText: Can only be equipped to a creature with 9 or less remaining HP. Heal 30 HP. 2x Hit Roll results for this creature. 2x Atk Damage for this creature.

plan.title: Bio-Regeneration heals on equip
plan.summary: Equip Bio-Regeneration to a creature at 5 HP and verify it heals 30 HP without exceeding base HP.

notes: Set player_1 primary current hp to 5 before Bio-Regeneration resolves.
Equip Bio-Regeneration to player_1 primary creature.

steps: Set the equipped creature current HP to 5.
Read the equipped creature current HP.
manualVerification: Confirm 009-E01 separately enforces the 9-or-less remaining HP equip requirement.
riskNotes: This fixture validates the heal branch only; hit roll and attack damage multipliers are separate effects.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
